Select a category and challenge yourself to recall the meanings and example sentences. Your progress and performance will be tracked in Statistics.

Question 1 of 10
Slangs
Chuffed

Meaning:

Very pleased or happy.

Example Sentence:

I was absolutely chuffed with my exam results.

GitHub Vault Sync

Enable cloud sync by connecting to your own GitHub repository. This ensures your learning records, custom vocabulary, and stats survive Vercel redeploys.

Requires repo access scope. This token is stored locally in your browser.

Speech & Audio Settings

Customize Text-to-Speech voices and behavior.

Gemini AI Configuration

Add your Gemini API Key to enable the AI Assistant features. You can get a free API Key from Google AI Studio.

Danger Zone / Backup

Manage local storage cache. These actions do not affect GitHub directly unless explicitly synced.

AI Study Assistant

Ask questions, explore word context, check grammar, or translate Hebrew phrases using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash.

Fetching structured definitions and audio examples.
